contract.direction: current VRP signal minus its exact 15-minute lag
contract.expiry_identity: nearest-listed-expiry research proxy; Dhan WEEK expiryCode=1 does not return the actual contract expiry
contract.marking: frictionless 1-minute close-to-close; no costs or slippage
contract.normalization: MTM points divided by theoretical maximum expiry loss at entry
contract.overlap_warning: minute-grid windows overlap and are descriptive, not independent trades
contract.structure_entry: all legs frozen inside rolling ATM +/-3 at entry
contract.structure_exit: exact entry strike and option type after horizon
contract.vrp_percentiles: causal, same minute of day, prior dates only, minimum 60 observations
contract.zero_crossing: sign change in trailing 5-minute median VRP signal
